name: agent Ludo
description:
configId has no sense. Better to talk about the env: testing/staging/prod, fixed by the MCP Server itself.
entityId has no sense, it should be an array of chain/role/entityId because the same agent can have several entityIds (1 sellerId + 1 buyerId), different on each chain.
We should not allow an agent to register with an address they don't control?
